The '''XQ6 Platform''' was designed by the [[Telgorn Corporation/Legends|Telgorn Corporation]] as a replacement for the [[XQ1 Platform|XQ1]] and [[XQ3 Platform]]s as it had more room for cargo, construction facilities and other such features.

==Notable stations==
*''[[DX-11a]]''
*''[[Elliirad Platform]]''
*''[[Research]]''
